project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Slb finished milling earlier than expected but there were Delays in rigging over to slickline due to production issues. Currently in hole with the slickline brush. Expect to rig up for drift ~16:00 and MFC40 ~20:00 local time. Estimate for uploading data Monday morning at some point.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Slb milled and flowed the well yesterday for a few hours, then continued milling during the night shift. Expect to rig up MFC tomorrow (26/04/26) around 15:00. Confirmed FTA required. Replacement MFC40 could arrive tomorrow afternoon as well.

project: PRJ03244 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9850 - SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Slb continuing to mill on HBA-11. Current lookahead has rig up for drift run/MFC Saturday Evening 25/04/26, but depends on progress made with milling. Caliper tool string function checked and good to go.

project: PRJ03266 - Well Services Group (Exlog) - Exlog (WSG) - WRF-2 - GR_CCL
comment: Update from Luis: job changed from confirmed to contingency. He has also requested an engineer to support. Will be short notice call out.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: LL arrived on board Halfdan B platform. Currently ops: Slb rigged up Eline on HBA-11 to run mill. Will then rig back to slickline for drift then MFC40. Latest lookahead has late Friday at the earliest for running the drift but subject to change. FTA required.
